name: Capture Session Detail (not-found)
description: Capture session detail page in its resolved not-found state (/captures/[sessionId]). Without a routeStub the sentinel session ID 404s naturally and the page renders its 'Session not found' error view with a 'Back to Captures' button. This mirrors the demo-detail pattern: a dynamic [id] route with a fixed sentinel that 404s to a deterministic resolved view. The not-found branch is the safe, API-free baseline. The populated variant (with routeStub for the session + video endpoints) is deferred — the VideoPlayer issues a media GET that a JSON stub cannot satisfy, and the console-error behavior of a 404'd video needs verification. Ports captures-recordings.spec.ts non-existent session test. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Session not found
states.description: The resolved not-found view rendered when the capture session fetch fails (sentinel ID returns 404). Confirmed via local element dump: heading-2-session-not-found and button-back-to-captures are the stable elements in this branch.

assertions.description: 'Session not found' heading — confirms the page rendered its error state, not a loading spinner.
'Back to Captures' button — the recovery affordance on the not-found view.
